use_cases: Triggering form submissions in hero sections and landing pages
Navigation actions with variant styles (link, default, outline)
Primary call-to-action buttons with customizable sizes
Accessible interactive elements with focus and disabled states
Building compound UI components with asChild prop composition
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with Radix UI Slot integration and CVA variants for flexible styling. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (sm, default, lg, icon) for diverse use cases. Designed for accessibility with focus-visible states and disabled handling, commonly used as action triggers in hero sections and forms.
